---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Obsession Tracker
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear description of what problem this feature would solve or what need it
addresses. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Privacy Impact

Does this feature involve:

- [ ] Location data
- [ ] User-generated content (photos, notes)
- [ ] Network requests to external services
- [ ] Data storage changes
- [ ] None of the above

If any are checked, please describe how privacy should be maintained.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples from other apps, or additional context here.
